---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(psych)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(powertools)
```
Power Analysis for Aim 1:

```{r}
df <- read.csv("/Users/austinra/BIOS6624/Project 2/Data Raw/PrelimData.csv")
```

```{r}
vars <- df[, c("IL_6", "MCP_1", "CORT_CNG3", "CVLT_CNG3")]

res <- corr.test(vars)

# Extract results
r_mat <- round(res$r, 2)
r_mat[upper.tri(r_mat)] <- ""

#Labels
labels <- c(
  IL_6 = "IL_6",
  MCP_1 = "MCP_1",
  CORT_CNG3 = "Change in Cortical Thickness",
  CVLT_CNG3 = "Change in CVLT score"
)

# Apply labels to row and column names
colnames(r_mat) <- labels[colnames(r_mat)]
rownames(r_mat) <- labels[rownames(r_mat)]

# Print the table
kable(r_mat,
      caption = "Preliminary Data Correlation Matrix",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      align = "c") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))
```

```{r}
# correlations
r_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.7, by = 0.05)

# alpha levels
alphas <- c(0.05/4, 0.05/6, 0.05/24)
alpha_labels <- c("0.05/4", "0.05/6", "0.05/24")

# empty results object
results1 <- data.frame()

for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
  for (r in r_vals) {
    
    test <- corr.1samp(
      N = 175,
      rho0 = 0,
      rhoA = r,
      alpha = alphas[a],
      sides = 2
    )
    
    results1 <- rbind(
      results1,
      data.frame(
        r = r,
        alpha = alpha_labels[a],
        power = test
      )
    )
  }
}

results1

```
Figure
```{r}
results1_80 <- results1 %>%
  arrange(alpha, r) %>%              
  group_by(alpha) %>%
  filter(power <= 0.95) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    r = round(r, 2),
    power = round(power, 2)
  )

results1_80 <- results1_80 %>%
  mutate(
    alpha = factor(alpha, levels = c("0.05/4", "0.05/6", "0.05/24")),
    r = round(r, 2),
    power = round(power * 100, 1)   # convert to percent
  ) %>%
  arrange(alpha)

results1_80 %>%
  select(alpha, r, power) %>%  
  kable(
    caption = "Aim 1: Correlation and Power Relationship Across Alpha Thresholds (N = 175)",
    col.names = c("Alpha Threshold", "Correlation (r)", "Power (%)"),
    align = "c",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "center"
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)


```

Power Analysis for Aim 1- first correlation to achieve 50% power
```{r}
#check what correlation is needed to hit 80% power for each alpha correction level
target_power <- 0.8

# Function to find r for a single alpha
find_r_for_power <- function(n, alpha, power_target) {
  f <- function(r) {
    corr.1samp(N = 175, rho0 = 0, rhoA = r, alpha = alpha, sides = 2) - power_target
  }
  uniroot(f, lower = 0.01, upper = 0.99)$root
}

# Loop over alpha values 
results_r <- numeric(length(alphas))
for (i in seq_along(alphas)) {
  results_r[i] <- find_r_for_power(n = n, alpha = alphas[i], power_target = target_power)
}

# Create clean table
aim1_r <-data.frame(
  Alpha = alpha_labels,
  r_needed_for_80_percent_power = round(results_r, 5)
)

aim1_r %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Correlation Thresholds Required for 80% Power in Aim 1",
    col.names = c("Alpha Threshold", "r Required for 80% Power"),
    align = "c",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    digits = 3
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    position = "center",
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```


Power Analysis for Aim 2:
```{r}
# correlations
r_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.7, by = 0.1)

#difference in correlations
delta_rho_vals <- seq(0.1, 0.5, by = 0.1)

# alpha levels
alphas <- c(0.05/4, 0.05/6, 0.05/24)
alpha_labels <- c("0.05/4", "0.05/6", "0.05/24")

#low/high amyloid proportions: 20% to 80%
prop_low_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.8, by = 0.1)

# convert to n.ratio = n_low / n_high
nratio_vals <- prop_low_vals / (1 - prop_low_vals)

# maximum total sample size
N_max <- 175

# empty results object
results2 <- data.frame()

#safety
eps <- 1e-6  

#ChatGPT helped with function to avoid errors
for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
  for (delta_rho in delta_rho_vals) {
    for (i in seq_along(r_vals)) {
      
      rho1 <- r_vals[i]
      rho2 <- rho1 + delta_rho
      
      # skip invalid correlations 
      if (abs(rho2) >= (1 - eps)) next
      
      for (j in seq_along(nratio_vals)) {
        
        nr <- nratio_vals[j]
        prop_low <- prop_low_vals[j]
        
        # calculate n1 and n2
        n1 <- round(N_max / (1 + nr))
        n2 <- N_max - n1
        
        # SAFETY: clip values slightly away from ±1
        rho1_safe <- min(max(rho1, -1 + eps), 1 - eps)
        rho2_safe <- min(max(rho2, -1 + eps), 1 - eps)
        
        test <- try(
          corr.2samp(
            n1 = n1,
            n.ratio = nr,
            rho1 = rho1_safe,
            rho2 = rho2_safe,
            alpha = alphas[a],
            sides = 2
          ),
          silent = TRUE
        )
        
        # skip if error
        if (inherits(test, "try-error")) next
        
        results2 <- rbind(
          results2,
          data.frame(
            rho1 = rho1,
            rho2 = rho2,
            delta_rho = delta_rho,
            n_ratio = nr,
            prop_low = prop_low,
            n1 = n1,
            n2 = n2,
            alpha = alpha_labels[a],
            power = test
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }
}


results2


```



Power Analysis for Aim 2- first correlation to achieve 80% power
```{r}
# Storage
aim2_r <- data.frame()
# Function to find minimal detectable delta_rho for 2-sample correlation
find_delta_rho_for_power <- function(rho1, n_total, n_ratio, alpha, power_target = 0.8) {
  
  # wrapper function for uniroot
  f <- function(delta_rho) {
    rho2 <- rho1 + delta_rho
    
    # corr must be between -1 and 1
    if (abs(rho2) >= 1) return(1)  # force function to >0 so uniroot skips
    
    # compute power
    corr.2samp(
      n1 = round(n_total / (1 + n_ratio)), 
      n.ratio = n_ratio,
      rho1 = rho1,
      rho2 = rho2,
      alpha = alpha,
      sides = 2
    ) - power_target
  }
  
  # uniroot search: delta_rho must be positive
  res <- try(uniroot(f, lower = 0.001, upper = 0.99), silent = TRUE)
  
  if (inherits(res, "try-error")) return(NA)
  
  return(res$root)
}

# Parameters
target_power <- 0.8
N_max <- 175
rho1_vals <- aim1_r$r_needed_for_80_percent_power  # use Aim 1 min corr
alpha_vals <- alphas
prop_low_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.5, by = 0.1)
nratio_vals <- prop_low_vals / (1 - prop_low_vals)

# Storage
aim2_r <- data.frame()

# Loop over alpha, rho1, and group ratios
for (i in seq_along(alpha_vals)) {
  alpha <- alpha_vals[i]
  
  for (rho1 in rho1_vals) {
    for (j in seq_along(nratio_vals)) {
      nr <- nratio_vals[j]
      prop_low <- prop_low_vals[j]
      
      delta_rho <- find_delta_rho_for_power(
        rho1 = rho1,
        n_total = N_max,
        n_ratio = nr,
        alpha = alpha,
        power_target = target_power
      )
      
      aim2_r <- rbind(
        aim2_r,
        data.frame(
          alpha = alpha,
          rho1 = rho1,
          prop_low = prop_low,
          n1 = round(N_max / (1 + nr)),
          n2 = N_max - round(N_max / (1 + nr)),
          delta_rho_80 = delta_rho,
          rho2_80 = rho1 + delta_rho
        )
      )
    }
  }
}



aim2_r_clean <- aim2_r %>%
  mutate(
    rho1 = round(rho1, 2),
    delta_rho_80 = round(delta_rho_80, 2),
    rho2_80 = round(rho2_80, 2),
    prop_low = round(prop_low, 2)
  ) %>%
  arrange(alpha, rho1, prop_low)

aim2_r_clean %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Minimum Detectable Differences in Correlation (Δρ) for 80% Power",
    col.names = c(
      "Alpha",
      "ρ (Group 1)",
      "Proportion (Group 1)",
      "n (Group 1)",
      "n (Group 2)",
      "Δρ",
      "ρ (Group 2)"
    ),
    align = "c",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down")) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/4", 1, nrow(aim2_r_clean)/3) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/6", nrow(aim2_r_clean)/3 + 1, 2*nrow(aim2_r_clean)/3) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/24", 2*nrow(aim2_r_clean)/3 + 1, nrow(aim2_r_clean))



# Remove alpha column for display
aim2_r_display <- aim2_r_clean %>%
  select(-alpha)  # drop the column

# Count rows per alpha group
rows_per_group <- nrow(aim2_r_display) / 3  # assuming 3 alpha groups

# Build table
aim2_r_display %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Minimum Detectable Differences in Correlation (Δρ) for 80% Power",
    col.names = c(
      "ρ (Group 1)",
      "Proportion (Group 1)",
      "n (Group 1)",
      "n (Group 2)",
      "Δρ",
      "ρ (Group 2)"
    ),
    align = "c",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    full_width = FALSE
  ) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/4", 1, rows_per_group) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/6", rows_per_group + 1, 2*rows_per_group) %>%
  group_rows("α = 0.05/24", 2*rows_per_group + 1, 3*rows_per_group)
```


Figure displaying expected proportion w low vs high ad (50 low, 125 high ~ 30% 70%)
```{r}
# Fixed group sizes
n1_fixed <- 50   # lower rho group
n2_fixed <- 125  # higher rho group
n_ratio_fixed <- n2_fixed / n1_fixed  # = 2.5
N_total <- n1_fixed + n2_fixed

# Storage
aim2_r_fixed <- data.frame()

# Loop over alpha and rho1 only
for (i in seq_along(alpha_vals)) {
  alpha <- alpha_vals[i]
  
  for (rho1 in rho1_vals) {
    
    delta_rho <- find_delta_rho_for_power(
      rho1 = rho1,
      n_total = N_total,
      n_ratio = n_ratio_fixed,
      alpha = alpha,
      power_target = target_power
    )
    
    aim2_r_fixed <- rbind(
      aim2_r_fixed,
      data.frame(
        alpha = alpha,
        rho1 = rho1,
        n_low = n1_fixed,
        n_high = n2_fixed,
        delta_rho_80 = delta_rho,
        rho2_80 = rho1 + delta_rho
      )
    )
  }
}

aim2_r_fixed <- aim2_r_fixed %>%
  mutate(
    alpha_label = case_when(
      alpha == 0.05/4  ~ "0.05/4",
      alpha == 0.05/6  ~ "0.05/6",
      alpha == 0.05/24 ~ "0.05/24"
    ),
    alpha_label = factor(alpha_label, levels = c("0.05/4", "0.05/6", "0.05/24"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(alpha_label)

aim2_r_fixed %>%
  select(alpha_label, rho1, n_low, n_high, delta_rho_80, rho2_80) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Minimum Detectable Difference in Correlations (Δρ) for 80% Power with Unequal Group Sizes (n = 50 vs 125)",
    col.names = c("Alpha", "ρ (Lower Group)", "n (Lower)", "n (Higher)", "Δρ for 80% Power", "ρ (Higher Group)"),
    digits = 3,
    align = "c",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped", "scale_down"),
    full_width = FALSE
)
```
